    unmarkRelicSpawned(String id)
    Marks a relic as no longer in-world (dropped item despawned or was destroyed).

    • registerItems

    • getTrackedWorld

      public static org.bukkit.World getTrackedWorld()
      Returns the overworld (first world) consistently. Both ItemListener and RandomChestGenerator must use this same method so relic-spawned flags are read/written to the same world PDC.

    • unmarkRelicSpawned

      public static void unmarkRelicSpawned(String id)
      Marks a relic as no longer in-world (dropped item despawned or was destroyed). Clears the flag so chest generators may spawn it again.
